twitch_info.title: I wanna kill the kamilia 3 v2.02 - The Journey to 100% (Beaten K3 v1.50 100%)

I had no idea it would make THAT much of a difference but, now I know.
literally changed the difficulty from what felt like 70 to 50
so I was wrong, there wasn't a "git gud"
it was entirely a strategy lmao
well uh tysm

I am so curious why that is a game changer
you saw it have a massive effect, it's no joke lmao

actually doubled the success rate of that jump
ikr actually absurd

but it genuinely does lmao
I actually kind of like jump refersher save
do you have guy tower crystal?

ye Ido
this is my v1.50 100% save so I already have all v1.50 crystals
and how fast I beat that jump refresher save just proved it to you lmao
that jump refresher save actually took me like
15+ hours to learn iirc
i think that save took me 45 mins to an hour on my playthrough
when I originally was going for crystal
but i doubt i'd just be able to do it again
there's a secret to the save
when you get past the high gate into the  diamond aka the hard part
its entirely rhythm based
if you know the jump press rhythm you get through it
you kind of need to semi-ignore what's in front of you and just focus on the rhythm once you get into the hard section
i rmr hearing redire say that the jump refresher save is like mainly muscle memory dependent
which i think i agree with
it plays fairly different than the other saves
it is, but the way I created that muscle memory was via rhythm
i matched the rhythm to my input timings and that got me through
and the more I did that, the muscle memory eventually came in
basically the input rhythm is how you unlock that muscle memory
the best way to get that rhythm is to watch someone else doing it
my video with the input counter would help the most tbh
during my gtc crystal
tbh I made it harder for myself at the time
I did gtc as soon as I got to it
I did not let me get past guy tower until I got it
i did that throughout the game
every crystal I could get or secret I could get I did as soon as was accessible
hidden bosses I did after secret 5 though, which means the crystal in hidden boss 2 I did after secret 5.
gl CoolCat
ty CoolCat
brb ~15-30 mins and then back to grinding this

I tested the RZ corner a bit. If you intend on holding left through the corner, it seems both the left and jump press are frame perfect when walking off the block, whereas the left press is more lenient when jumping over the block, at least if you 6 frame the first jump.
I only tested with best align for corner and a single valign, so it's possible the walkoff strat is more lenient in other circumstances, but I don't think it is.
